libraryStrings.l10n.noNeighbors: Il n'y a pas encore d'étapes à connecter.
libraryStrings.l10n.contentRequired: Vous devez sélectionner un type de contenu pour cette étape.
libraryStrings.l10n.errorTotalWeightMustBe100: The sum of all weights must be 100. Currently it is @current.
libraryStrings.l10n.previewExplanation: This is how the user will see your content
libraryStrings.l10n.livesExplanation: Set the number of lives or leave empty.
libraryStrings.l10n.timeExplanation: Set the remaining global time in seconds.
libraryStrings.l10n.stageTimeExplanation: Set the remaining time for this stage.
libraryStrings.l10n.stateExplanation: Set the desired state for this stage. Note that this may throw a curve ball at state handling.
libraryStrings.l10n.scoreExplanation: Set the desired score for this stage. Note that subsequent scoring in an exercise of this stage will overwrite this value.
libraryStrings.a11y.pathFromTo: Chemin de la scène @from à la scène @to
